raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Generative AI and deepfakes threaten election integrity by enabling the creation and distribution of deceptive content.",
    "The passage of AB 2655 aims to restrict the posting and distribution of deceptive deepfakes during elections.",
    "Deepfakes can attribute false speech and conduct to individuals, posing risks to democracy.",
    "Advances in AI technology have made it easier for individuals to generate deceptive content.",
    "AI-powered disinformation has become a significant threat to democracy, especially in the context of weakened democratic institutions.",
    "The prevalence of AI-generated deepfakes is intensifying, particularly since 2020.",
    "Deepfakes have already destabilized national elections in multiple countries, including Argentina, Slovakia, Taiwan, Bangladesh, and the United States."
  ]
```
